description: Environment setup: install dependencies and verify baseline tests pass with full coverage metrics
steps: Run pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt boto3 botocore
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ --cov=cdk_base --cov=lambda -q and confirm all 298 tests pass
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet and confirm synthesis succeeds
acceptance_criteria: CDK synthesis for dev environment succeeds
Coverage report shows cdk_base at 100% and lambda at 97%
